textByHash.2d5e6b6d3f66d087f83814ec70f6194059f46150: Hello there friend! I'm Bobby the gnome child.
textByHash.8fe70731b8a4809ece0510ae4aa34f77adcacdde: Oh yes. Me and Pa have been looking forward to this all year. Isn't that right Pa?
textByHash.e07dfaba79d4b32f3b5dd9247cedad08b1d58b43: Nice to meet you . Does somebody need a hug?
